data.body:
## TDD Requirement

Write failing tests (RED state) for enrich-file-impact.sh and error-sweep.sh v2 removal.

## Implementation Steps

1. Add new test functions to tests/scripts/test-end-session-error-sweep.sh:
   - test_error_sweep_no_tk_list_call: assert grep -q 'tk list' plugins/dso/skills/end-session/error-sweep.sh exits non-zero
   - test_error_sweep_no_tk_create_call: assert grep -q 'tk create' plugins/dso/skills/end-session/error-sweep.sh exits non-zero
   - test_error_sweep_uses_ticket_cli: assert grep -q 'ticket list\|ticket create' plugins/dso/skills/end-session/error-sweep.sh exits zero (after implementation, not before)

2. Create tests/scripts/test-enrich-file-impact-v2-removal.sh:
   - test_enrich_file_impact_no_TK_variable: assert grep -q '^TK=' plugins/dso/scripts/enrich-file-impact.sh exits non-zero
   - test_enrich_file_impact_no_v2_fallback_branch: assert grep -q 'TICKETS_DIR.*id.*\.md' plugins/dso/scripts/enrich-file-impact.sh exits non-zero
   - test_enrich_file_impact_no_use_v3_variable: assert grep -q '_use_v3' plugins/dso/scripts/enrich-file-impact.sh exits non-zero

3. Verify all tests fail (RED state).

## Test Filename Notes
- Source: enrich-file-impact.sh → fuzzy: enrichfileimpactsh
- Test: test-enrich-file-impact-v2-removal.sh → fuzzy: testenrichfileimpactv2removalsh — 'enrichfileimpact' is substring. Fuzzy match OK.
- Source: error-sweep.sh → fuzzy: errorsweepsh — substring of testendessionerrorsweepsh. Fuzzy match OK via existing test file.

## Files Modified
- tests/scripts/test-end-session-error-sweep.sh (Edit — append test functions)
- tests/scripts/test-enrich-file-impact-v2-removal.sh (Create)
- .test-index (Edit — add enrich-file-impact.sh → test-enrich-file-impact-v2-removal.sh mapping if fuzzy match fails; verify first)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] test_error_sweep_no_tk_list_call function exists
  Verify: grep -q 'test_error_sweep_no_tk_list_call' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-end-session-error-sweep.sh
- [ ] test_enrich_file_impact_no_TK_variable function exists
  Verify: grep -q 'test_enrich_file_impact_no_TK_variable' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-enrich-file-impact-v2-removal.sh
- [ ] Tests FAIL on current codebase (RED state)
  Verify: { bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-end-session-error-sweep.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'FAIL'; }
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
